full_text:
Qin Qi 秦祺
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qin Qi (秦祺). Served Wei under Xiahou Dun. In novel, killed by Guan Yu leaving Cao Cao. Qin Qi is a fictional character. Qin Qi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Qin Qi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
